objective: Fix recent wrong-answer ordering and timestamp visibility in parent report flows.
summary_of_changes: Unified attempt timestamp parsing, added a shared correctness helper, preserved ts and answeredAt in normalized report payloads, changed wrong-event selection to sort all incorrect attempts descending before truncating, added defensive UI sorting, surfaced answer time in the recent-wrong cards, and made weak-area explanations more parent-readable.
residual_risk: Week-over-week metrics may still rely on inconsistent identity mapping between display name and local telemetry user id.
next_step: Audit week-over-week identity and data-window semantics separately from recent-wrong ordering.

objective: Add root-level iteration memory scaffold for long-run agent work.
summary_of_changes: Created repository-wide rules for mandatory pre-read, done definition, validation expectations, anti-patterns, and required writeback. Seeded root change history and lessons learned with concrete entries from the recent parent-report fix.
tests_run: manual review of file structure and field consistency
residual_risk: The scaffold only compounds value if future iterations consistently read and update it.
next_step: Use these files as the mandatory pre-flight context for the next parent-report, stats, and hint-quality iteration.

objective: Make exam-sprint wrong-answer retry flow reliably re-check corrected answers while preserving simplest-fraction enforcement.
summary_of_changes: Kept the existing fraction simplest-form validation, added a retry-focus helper that returns focus to the answer field after a wrong attempt, and changed Enter-key handling so pressing Enter on the submit button re-runs answer checking instead of incorrectly acknowledging and advancing past the question.
residual_risk: Advancing to a new question is still intentionally gated behind acknowledge/skip after a wrong attempt; if product wants fully ungated next-question navigation, that should be a separate UX decision.
next_step: If retry UX complaints continue, audit all non-answer Enter paths and mouse-focus transitions in exam-sprint to ensure they always prefer re-check over accidental advance.

objective: Extract parent-report domain logic into 5 shared engines, connect page to engines, add regression tests, improve UX (weakness cards, copy export, weekly focus, AI actions).
summary_of_changes: Created 5 shared report engines (weakness, recommendation, report_data_builder, practice_from_wrong, parent_copy). Refactored parent-report/index.html to delegate all domain logic (explainWrongDetail, buildPracticeFromWrong, renderWeeklyFocus, renderAiActions, copy text) to shared engines. Replaced table-based weakness display with card-style rendering including ranking, reason, and next-action from weakness engine. Added enrichReportData call to both showDashboard and refreshReport flows. Created 10 regression tests (6 spec + 4 integration) all passing. Added agent preflight/postflight scripts and acceptance spec.
residual_risk: renderDashboard still has significant inline code for h24, KPI grid, daily chart, WoW comparison, radar, and progress trend. These could be further extracted in future iterations.
next_step: Push, run cross_validate_remote, then consider extracting remaining renderDashboard subsections into shared modules.

objective: Fix weakness card duplicate innerHTML bug, add clickable practice deep-links to weakness cards, DRY renderRemedial moduleMap via shared getTopicLink delegate.
summary_of_changes: Removed duplicate weakTable.innerHTML assignment (copy-paste bug from prior iteration). Changed weakness cards next-action text from plain div to clickable <a> link that resolves topic to practice module URL via AIMathRecommendationEngine.getTopicLink(). Added analytics tracking for weakness_practice_click. Replaced renderRemedial inline moduleMap+findModuleLink with the shared getTopicLink delegate. Added 3 regression tests for topic link resolution.
residual_risk: TOPIC_LINK_MAP may need updating when new modules are added. renderRemedial still has its own rec-building logic that could be unified with AIMathRecommendationEngine.buildRecommendations().
next_step: Unify renderRemedial rec-building logic with shared recommendation engine; consider extracting renderWoW and renderRadar to shared modules.

objective: Enrich renderRemedial cards with weakness engine reason+action text, replacing generic strings.
summary_of_changes: Changed renderRemedial rec-building to use describeWeakReason() and nextAction() delegates (from AIMathWeaknessEngine) instead of generic template strings. Added reason line above action line in remedial cards for richer context. Added regression test verifying weakness engine produces meaningful reason/action text for different weakness profiles.
residual_risk: renderRemedial still has its own card rendering (not shared with weakness cards above). renderWoW, renderRadar, renderProgressTrend remain inline.
next_step: Extract renderWoW to shared module, or improve practice-from-wrong UX flow.

objective: Extract Week-over-Week comparison logic from inline renderWoW into testable shared wow_engine.js module.
summary_of_changes: Created AIMathWoWEngine with computeWoW(), formatDelta(), getPrevWeekAttempts(). Refactored renderWoW in parent-report to delegate to shared engine with fallback. Added 4 regression tests covering normal comparison, empty prev week, delta formatting, and null safety.
residual_risk: getPrevWeekAttempts depends on d.name matching the telemetry userId. Identity mapping between cloud report name and localStorage key is still unverified. renderRadar and renderProgressTrend remain inline.
next_step: Verify identity mapping between d.name and telemetry userId, or extract renderRadar to shared module.

objective: Extract radar chart concept mapping from inline to shared radar_engine.js module, making concept-to-module mapping testable and centralized.
summary_of_changes: Created AIMathRadarEngine with CONCEPT_MAP, computeConceptScores(), conceptNames(). Refactored renderRadar in parent-report to delegate to shared engine with inline fallback. Fixed legend to use conceptScores array instead of old concepts object. Added 4 regression tests covering aggregation, empty input, concept names, and substring matching.
residual_risk: SVG rendering remains inline in renderRadar (view layer, acceptable). CONCEPT_MAP needs updating when new modules are added. renderProgressTrend still inline.
next_step: Extract renderProgressTrend to shared module, or improve advice section quality.

objective: Extract renderProgressTrend weekly accuracy computation from inline to shared progress_trend_engine.js module.
summary_of_changes: Created AIMathProgressTrendEngine with computeWeeklyTrend(entries, nowMs) and hasAnyData(weeks). Refactored renderProgressTrend in parent-report to delegate to shared engine with inline fallback. Eliminated redundant per-iteration localStorage parse (was inside the loop). Added 5 regression tests covering empty input, weekly bucketing, hasAnyData, and null/missing ts safety.
residual_risk: Bar rendering and paid-gate blur remain inline (view layer, acceptable). Teacher log entries lack schema validation — malformed entries silently skipped.
next_step: Extract renderPracticeSummary to shared module.

objective: Extract renderPracticeSummary aggregation logic from inline to shared practice_summary_engine.js module.
summary_of_changes: Created AIMathPracticeSummaryEngine with recentEvents(events, days, nowMs), aggregateStats(events), groupByKind(events). Refactored renderPracticeSummary in parent-report to delegate to shared engine with inline fallback. Added 6 regression tests covering filtering, null safety, accuracy computation, grouping, and fallback key handling.
residual_risk: latestText in aggregateStats uses toLocaleString which varies across environments. View-layer rendering still inline (acceptable).
next_step: Extract parent advice section to shared module.

objective: Extract parent advice section from inline to shared parent_advice_engine.js module with adviceTone.
summary_of_changes: Created AIMathParentAdviceEngine with buildAdvice(opts) and adviceTone(advices, accuracy). Refactored advice section in parent-report to delegate to shared engine with inline fallback. Banner tone now dynamic (ok/warn/bad) instead of always 'warn'. Added 9 regression tests covering all branches: volume, accuracy levels, stuck levels, weaknesses, time, and tone.
residual_risk: Advice text is hardcoded Chinese strings — future iteration could parameterize for i18n.
next_step: Connect aggregate.js quadrant analysis to parent-report for deeper learning analytics.

objective: Expand TOPIC_LINK_MAP to cover all CONCEPT_MAP modules — fix commercial-pack1-fraction-sprint falling through to generic fraction link.
summary_of_changes: Added 4 new entries to TOPIC_LINK_MAP: commercial-pack1-fraction-sprint, national-bank, midterm, grand-slam. Placed specific entries before generic substring matches to ensure correct resolution order. Added 4 regression tests for new mappings.
residual_risk: TOPIC_LINK_MAP still uses substring matching — if future module names share substrings, order may need re-evaluation.
next_step: Audit parent-report for UX improvements: collapsible sections, aggregate.js integration, or identity mapping verification.

objective: Add collapsible section groups to parent report dashboard to reduce visual overwhelm (17 cards → 7 groups).
summary_of_changes: Added <details>/<summary> collapsible groups wrapping all 17 dashboard cards into 7 logical groups: 24h stats (collapsed), Quick Summary (open), 7-Day Overview (collapsed), Learning Analysis (collapsed), Advanced Analysis (collapsed), Wrong Q & Practice (open), Advice & Export (open). Added CSS for rpt-group with custom arrow marker, hover, and count badge. Pure HTML5, no JS required, progressive enhancement.
residual_risk: Groups are static — could be dynamic based on data availability. Parents may not discover collapsed sections initially. Consider adding expand-all button.
next_step: Verify d.name ↔ telemetry userId identity mapping, or merge redundant weakness/remedial sections.

objective: Fix WoW identity mismatch: parent-report was querying telemetry with d.name (display name) instead of device UUID — resulting in WoW always showing empty prev-week data.
summary_of_changes: Added getDeviceUid() helper that resolves AIMathCoachLog.getOrCreateUserId() (device UUID stored in localStorage). Changed getPrevWeekAttempts and fallback listAttempts calls from d.name to getDeviceUid(). Added regression test proving UUID resolves to stored attempts while display name does not.
residual_risk: If parent views report on a different device than student practiced, WoW will still be empty (expected — telemetry is device-local). Cloud-stored attempt data is a future enhancement.
next_step: Merge redundant weakness/remedial sections or add expand-all button for collapsible groups.

objective: Add expand-all / collapse-all toggle button for collapsible section groups in parent report dashboard.
summary_of_changes: Added '📂 展開全部 / 📁 收合全部' toggle button between student info card and first section group. Button checks if all groups are open; if so, collapses all; otherwise expands all. Updates button text dynamically.
residual_risk: Button state not persisted across page reloads. No animation on group transitions.
next_step: Merge redundant weakness and remedial sections, or look beyond parent-report for other modules to improve.

objective: Fix 3 parent-report quality issues: XSS-safe esc() attribute escaping, wrong-count consistency (5 vs 3), h24 modules stale state.
summary_of_changes: 1) esc() now escapes double quotes (") and single quotes (') to prevent HTML attribute injection. 2) parent_copy_engine.js wrong list sliced to 5 items matching dashboard display. 3) h24Modules element cleared when empty to prevent stale data across re-renders. Added 2 regression tests: esc() quote escaping verification, parent copy 5-wrong-items assertion.
residual_risk: esc() only covers parent-report page; other HTML pages may have their own esc/escape functions without quote handling.
next_step: Audit esc() in other pages for same vulnerability, or continue with exam-sprint/empire quality improvements.

objective: Fix exam-sprint escapeHtml() missing quote escaping — critical XSS vulnerability in data-qid attribute context.
summary_of_changes: Added .replaceAll('"','"') and .replaceAll("'",''') to exam-sprint escapeHtml(). This function is used in attribute context (data-qid at line 1593), making the missing quote escaping a real injection risk. Audited all 8 HTML escape functions across 8 pages: 5 already safe, 2 low-risk (no escaping but not used in attributes), 1 critical (this fix). Added regression test verifying escapeHtml source includes quote escaping.
residual_risk: safeStr() in exam-sprint, g5-grand-slam, and linear does no escaping at all, but is used only for text content (textContent/innerText), not innerHTML attributes. If any future code paths use safeStr output in innerHTML, it would become vulnerable.
next_step: Consider standardizing a shared escapeHtml utility across all modules, or continue with aggregate.js integration.

objective: Fix practice answer checker to accept equivalent unsimplified fractions (e.g., 2/4 accepted when answer is 1/2).
summary_of_changes: Added parseFrac() and fractionsEqual() helpers using cross-multiplication for fraction equivalence. Modified checkNow() to accept equivalent fractions with a simplification reminder. If student enters 2/4 when answer is 1/2, shows '答對了！（提醒：最簡分數為 1/2）'. Added regression test verifying fractionsEqual logic and source verification.
residual_risk: Only applies to parent-report inline practice. Exam-sprint has its own fraction validation (parseAnswerForQuestion + nearlyEqual). Mixed number format (1 1/2) not supported — only simple fractions (n/d).
next_step: Add deep-link from wrong list item to the practice module for that topic. Or improve practice quiz early-exit tracking.

objective: Add deep-link to practice module from wrong list items so parents/students can navigate directly to practice.
summary_of_changes: Added '🔗 去練習模組' link button to each wrong list item using getTopicLink(w.t) for URL resolution. XSS-safe via esc(). Opens in new tab with rel=noopener. Added regression test verifying deep-link presence in source.
residual_risk: Link goes to module landing page, not specific question. If getTopicLink falls back to star-pack for unknown topics, link is still functional but less targeted.
next_step: Add similar deep-links to detailed analysis section cards.

objective: Add deep-link to practice module in detailed analysis (補強方案) cards.
summary_of_changes: Added '→ 前往練習模組' link at bottom of each detailed analysis card using getTopicLink(w.t). Consistent with wrong list deep-links from iteration 19. XSS-safe via esc(). Added regression test verifying '前往練習模組' and getTopicLink in analysis section source.
residual_risk: Same as iter 19 — getTopicLink fallback to star-pack for unknown topics.
next_step: Fix single-practice writeback so 再練一題 results are persisted.

objective: Persist single-practice results — 再練一題 mode was lose results silently.
summary_of_changes: In goNext() for non-quiz mode, reset quizRecorded and call persistPractice(isCorrect ? 1 : 0, 1) for each answered question before generating the next. Previously only quiz-3 and early-exit called persistPractice. Added regression test verifying single-mode persist logic in source. Refreshed latest_iteration_report.md to cover iterations 17-20.
residual_risk: persistPractice is async (cloud write); rapid goNext clicks could queue multiple writes. In practice this is harmless since each write is independent.
next_step: Write practice results to local attempt telemetry for aggregate analytics.

objective: Write practice results to local AIMathAttemptTelemetry so aggregate analytics includes parent-report practice.
summary_of_changes: Added AIMathAttemptTelemetry.appendAttempt() call inside persistPractice, before the cloud write. Each practice question creates an AttemptEvent with source='parent-report-practice', unit_id='parent-report-practice', using getDeviceUid() for identity. Silent try/catch to avoid blocking. Added regression test verifying telemetry write logic in source (appendAttempt, source tag, UUID identity, local-before-cloud ordering).
residual_risk: Practice events in local telemetry use unit_id='parent-report-practice' which may not match existing module unit_ids. Aggregate stats will show them as a separate unit. This is intentional to distinguish practice from real quiz attempts.
next_step: Add more remediation regression tests.

objective: Add 3 remediation regression tests for commercial-critical flows.
summary_of_changes: Added tests: (1) priority 1 targets weakest topic (most wrong + highest hint), (2) all recommendations have actionable text and concept labels, (3) known topics produce stable non-fallback links. Test count 51→54.
residual_risk: None — tests only, no behavior change.
next_step: Continue with aggregate.js integration or practice UX improvements.

objective: Decouple practice summary UI update from cloud write availability.
summary_of_changes: Moved r.practice.events.push() and renderPracticeSummary() before the cloud auth check in persistPractice. UI always updates immediately after practice; cloud write is now bonus persistence. Added regression test verifying renderPracticeSummary ordering precedes cloud auth check.
residual_risk: Cloud write failure is now truly silent — no UI feedback if cloud persistence fails. Acceptable since local telemetry + in-page state both update regardless.
next_step: Connect aggregate.js to parent-report for richer weakness detection.

objective: Connect aggregate.js ABCD quadrant analysis to parent-report dashboard.
summary_of_changes: Added aggregate.js script tag. Created quadrant analysis card in 進階分析 group with stacked horizontal bar showing A/B/C/D rates (independent correct, hint-correct, hint-wrong, no-hint-wrong). Uses local telemetry last 7 days. Shows aggregate.recommend() tips below the bar. Added 10 regression tests covering all 4 quadrant classifications, computeStats, recommend, pickTopWeaknesses, remedyLabel, source verification. Test count 55→65.
residual_risk: Quadrant analysis only uses local telemetry. If student practices on multiple devices, data is fragmented. Parent-report cloud data lacks AttemptEvent grain needed for quadrant classification.
next_step: Mixed number support in practice answer checker, or practice early-exit tracking.

objective: Support mixed numbers (1 1/2) and whole numbers in practice answer checker.
summary_of_changes: Extended parseFrac to handle mixed numbers (a b/c → improper fraction) and whole numbers (n → n/1). Updated normAns to preserve spaces for mixed number parsing. Changed placeholder to mention mixed format. Updated fractionsEqual test with mixed number and whole number assertions. Test count unchanged at 65.
residual_risk: Negative mixed numbers like -1 1/2 parse correctly via sign extraction. Students may enter other formats like 1+1/2 which is not supported.
next_step: Practice early-exit tracking.

objective: Track practice early-exit (completed vs quit) and show in summary.
summary_of_changes: Added isComplete parameter to persistPractice. Practice events now have completed:true|false. Early exit (結束小測) passes false. Practice summary shows '提前結束 N 次' badge when early exits exist. +1 regression test. Test count 65→66.
residual_risk: Single mode always records completed=true since each question is independently persisted. Navigation away without answering is not tracked (would require beforeunload, which is invasive).
next_step: Externalize kind→advice mappings to JSON, or continue with other quality improvements.

objective: Support decimal answer equivalence in practice answer checker.
summary_of_changes: Extended parseFrac to handle decimal inputs by converting to integer fraction (0.5→5/10, 1.25→125/100). Uses pure integer arithmetic (cross-multiplication) for comparison — no IEEE 754 issues. Students can now enter 0.5 and match 1/2 (and vice versa). Updated placeholder to show decimal format example. Extended fractionsEqual test with decimal↔fraction, decimal↔whole, and decimal↔mixed number assertions. Test count unchanged at 66.
residual_risk: Percentage format (50%) not supported — student entering 50% for 1/2 would fail. Repeating decimals (0.333...) cannot exactly equal 1/3. These are acceptable limitations for elementary G5 math.
next_step: Improve explainWrongDetail for broader kind coverage, or other quality improvements.

objective: Expand remediation explanation and fallback practice coverage to the main existing bank families.
summary_of_changes: Added explicit explainWrongDetail and buildPracticeFromWrong branches for average, money, discount/percent, ratio, decimal, speed, area/perimeter, time, and multi-step families. This removes generic fallthrough for these existing kinds and keeps fallback practice deterministic and integer-safe where appropriate. Added 3 regression tests covering family coverage, targeted practice generation, and integer-answer safety. Test count 66→69.
residual_risk: Coverage is still rule-based and alias-driven. New kind names can still fall through until explicitly mapped, but the current bank families now have concrete remediation coverage.
next_step: Either externalize kind→advice mappings for maintainability, or add source-level validation that every bank kind resolves to a non-generic remediation branch.

objective: Turn remediation coverage from a hand-picked bank check into a full repo-wide bank.js audit and close the remaining uncovered kind families.
summary_of_changes: Expanded explainWrongDetail and buildPracticeFromWrong for the remaining uncovered families across fraction-g5, exam-sprint, g5-grand-slam, volume-g5, interactive-g5-midterm1, and interactive-g5-national-bank. Added reusable remediation branches for fraction arithmetic basics, fraction comparison, unit conversions, composite volume, line-chart reading, angle geometry, number theory, place value, symmetry, starter algebra, large-number comparison, and division sufficiency. Added a dedicated parent-report-bank-audit spec that scans every current docs/*/bank.js file, handles both executable bank wrappers and literal-array assignment variants, and fails on any generic remediation fallthrough or unusable fallback practice. Test count 71→73.
residual_risk: The audit covers all current docs/*/bank.js modules, but remediation remains handwritten rule logic. Future bank additions still require new mappings even though the regression gate will now fail immediately.
next_step: Use the new audit gate to keep future remediation coverage honest, then externalize kind-family remediation rules into data so additions need less code.

objective: Make the parent-report first screen more decision-oriented by surfacing the top 3 weakness cards directly in the weekly summary area.
summary_of_changes: Added a weekly weakness summary card to the first screen that shows up to 3 ranked weak topics using the existing weakness ranking, reason text, action text, and stable practice links. This keeps the first screen aligned with the commercial goal of letting a parent understand what is weak, why, and what to do next without opening deeper sections. Added a summary regression test that verifies the quick-summary weakness card exists, stays capped at 3, explains why a topic is weak, and includes a direct practice CTA. Test count 73→74.
residual_risk: The first screen now duplicates a compact version of weakness context that also appears later in the report. If weakness copy evolves, the summary card should keep reusing shared reason/action delegates rather than fork its own rules.
next_step: Keep the weekly weakness summary aligned with the deeper weakness section, then improve evidence clarity so parents can see the concrete signals behind the recommendation faster.

objective: Increase parent trust in the first-screen weakness summary by showing concrete evidence for each recommended weak area.
summary_of_changes: Extended the weekly weakness summary cards to show a short evidence line with wrong-count and high-hint-count signals (`本週證據：錯 N 題，提示 ≥ L2 M 次`) while keeping the existing top-3 cap, reason text, action text, and direct practice CTA. Strengthened the summary regression test to require both the evidence label and the hint-dependency count. Test count remains 74 because this iteration extends an existing summary spec rather than adding a new file.
residual_risk: The evidence line depends on the current weakness object fields (`w`, `h2`, `h3`). If weakness scoring payloads change shape later, the first-screen trust signal should continue to degrade gracefully instead of rendering misleading counts.
next_step: Move the first-screen evidence sentence generation into shared report logic so the quick summary and deeper sections stay synchronized.

objective: Reduce first-screen duplication by moving weakness evidence sentence generation into shared report logic.
summary_of_changes: Added `buildWeaknessEvidenceText()` to `AIMathWeaknessEngine`, exposed `evidence_text` on ranked weakness rows, and changed the weekly weakness summary in parent-report to delegate evidence formatting to the shared engine instead of assembling the sentence inline. Strengthened the summary regression test with a direct weakness-engine unit test and a source-level assertion that the page reuses the shared evidence builder. Test count 74→75.
residual_risk: The first-screen weakness card now reuses shared evidence logic, but the deeper weakness/remedial sections still render their own evidence/count UI inline. If those sections need copy changes later, consider centralizing their display formatting too.
next_step: Centralize deeper weakness and remedial evidence rendering so every parent-facing weakness surface uses the same evidence formatter.

objective: Keep deeper weakness and remedial evidence copy synchronized with the shared first-screen evidence formatter.
summary_of_changes: Changed the deeper weakness table to reuse `weaknessEvidenceText(w)` instead of assembling its own wrong-count and hint-count line, stored shared `evidenceText` on remediation recommendations, and rendered that shared evidence string inside detailed remedial cards. Added a remediation regression test that asserts the page reuses the shared formatter and no longer contains the old inline evidence string. Test count 75→76.
residual_risk: Weakness evidence copy is now shared across the first-screen, deeper weakness table, and detailed remedial cards, but the page still owns the HTML layout for those surfaces. Future presentation changes should keep using the shared evidence string rather than reintroducing inline count formatting.
next_step: Address the remaining parent-report commercial-readiness blocker in the client-side cloud-write token path before taking on broader recommendation-data refactors.

objective: Reduce parent-report cloud-sync secret exposure by removing bundle/global and persistent token write paths from the frontend.
summary_of_changes: Changed student auth cloud write access to read only a session-scoped runtime token, added one-time migration and clearing for the legacy localStorage PAT, removed `window.AIMathCloudSyncConfig.gistToken` support, and exposed explicit `setCloudWriteToken` / `clearCloudWriteToken` helpers for runtime use. Added a regression test that fails if bundle/global token injection or persistent localStorage lookup returns. Test count 76→77.
residual_risk: Cloud writeback still depends on a client-side runtime token because the current architecture writes directly to GitHub Gist from the browser. This patch removes the most dangerous persistence and bundle injection paths, but a backend proxy or service-owned write path is still the longer-term commercial hardening step.
next_step: Use the next iteration to replace the browser-owned parent-report write path with a backend-owned endpoint or the smallest reversible proxy path that preserves the current flow.

objective: Replace the browser-owned parent-report write path with a backend-owned registry endpoint while preserving the current name+PIN flow.
summary_of_changes: Added server-side parent-report registry fetch/upsert endpoints with hashed PIN validation and SQLite-backed storage. Switched the main parent-report sync and practice-result write paths in student_auth.js from direct browser Gist PATCH calls to backend POST calls, added configurable backend-base resolution via window/localStorage/query `api`, and changed parent-report unlock/refresh to pass the PIN into backend-validated fetches instead of comparing `entry.pin` in the browser. Added backend and source-level regression tests. Test count 77→78.
residual_risk: The static frontend now depends on a configured backend base (`AIMATH_PARENT_REPORT_API_BASE`, `AIMATH_API_BASE`, or `?api=`) for the hardened sync path. Remote cross-validation was not run because this change has not been deployed yet.
next_step: Deploy/configure the backend base for parent-report pages, then run remote validation and move to data-izing recommendation/advice mappings without changing behavior.
